source_current_inputs: LGRC9V3 same-budget peer route dose run

susceptibility_delta_trace.delta_source: LGRC9V3 packet arrival modified route_b node coherence

geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: The result strengthens provisional SU2 input evidence only. Replay-backed SU3, durable SU4, transfer SU5, SU6, final N22, and the N21 ND6 bridge remain blocked.
geometric_interpretation.dose_gradient: No prior interaction and 0.03 packet dose fail closed; 0.08 and 0.14 packet doses produce route-local SU2 deltas; 0.20 produces a larger delta but crosses the center coherence floor.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I4-A maps the route_b susceptibility dose boundary without changing I4 thresholds or replacing the I4 reference row.
geometric_interpretation.what_this_adds_to_i4: I4 showed one source-current route-local delta. I4-A shows the delta has a bounded dose region and a fail-closed high-dose boundary, so success is not a label-only or one-value artifact.

purpose: source-backed susceptibility dose and boundary probe
